title: Backported Wolves - Regions Unexplored Compat
description: This mod allows Backported Wolves variants to spawn naturally in Regions Unexplored biomes.
body:
## This mod allows [Backported Wolves](https://modrinth.com/mod/backported-wolves/versions) variants to spawn naturally in [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored) biomes. ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4579e0b0784fa5a36f9ba446c25d9feba4bd4fe.png)
#
Wolf Spawn Locations - **Ashen Wolf** - Alpha Grove - Cold Boreal Taiga - Frozen Pine Taiga - Deciduous Forest - Grassland # - **Black Wolf** - Blackwood Taiga - Mountains - Old Growth Bayou - Pine Slopes - Pine Taiga # - **Chestnut Wolf** - Blackwood Taiga - Boreal Taiga - Old Growth Bayou - Towering Cliffs # - **Pale Wolf** - Blackwood Taiga - Cold Boreal Taiga - Cold Deciduous Forest - Golden Boreal Taiga - Grassland - Shrubland # - **Rusty Wolf** - Bamboo Forest - Rainforest - Sparse Rainforest - Tropics # - **Snowy Wolf** - Frozen Pine Taiga - Frozen Tundra - Icy Heights - Spires # - **Spotted Wolf** - Baobab Savanna - Steppe - Dry Bushland # - **Striped Wolf** - Arid Mountains - Dry Bushland - Joshua Desert - Outback # - **Woods Wolf** - Rainforest - Deciduous Forest - Magnolia Woodland - Redwoods - Sparse Redwoods
